description: Contract for _revisePlan(comments) bridge function. React sends this JSON string, Kotlin parses it as Map<String, String>.

valid_payloads.name: single_comment
valid_payloads.payload: {"goal":"Please add error handling for null inputs"}
expected_values: Please add error handling for null inputs

valid_payloads.name: multiple_comments
valid_payloads.payload: {"goal":"Too broad — focus on PaymentService only","step-1":"Use the existing UserService instead of creating new","testing":"Add integration tests too"}
expected_values: Too broad — focus on PaymentService only
Use the existing UserService instead of creating new

valid_payloads.name: step_only_comments
valid_payloads.payload: {"step-0":"Read config file too","step-2":"Run integration tests as well"}

invalid_payloads.name: empty_string
invalid_payloads.reason: Kotlin JSON parser throws on empty string — was the original bug

invalid_payloads.name: plain_text
invalid_payloads.reason: Not valid JSON — Kotlin parser throws
